steps.title: Isolate the variable term
steps.content: Starting from $$12x+40=148,$$ subtract 40 on both sides to isolate the variable term.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The final check is to match the computed result to the answer choices. The value or equation found above matches Choice C — $12x = 108$, $12x = 108$. The other choices do not satisfy the same condition from the question, so C.
